nasb.text: It is also not good to fine the righteous, Nor to strike the noble for their uprightness.

esv.text: To impose a fine on a righteous man is not good, nor to strike the noble for their uprightness.

cnv.text: 懲罰義人，已是不當； 擊打正直的官長，更是不妥。

ccb.text: 责罚义人不妥， 杖责君子不义。

csbs.text: 惩罚义人，实在不好； 责打正直的高贵者，也是不对。
